data.description:

data.title: Ex-Pump.fun Dev Behind $2M Theft Jailed in London for Bail Breach, Faces 7+ Years Prison
data.description:
Ex-Pump. fun Dev, Jarett Dunn, sits in a London prison after breaching bail conditions while awaiting trial for stealing approximately $2 million from the platform in May 2024. The Canadian national has attempted to withdraw his guilty plea and faces at least seven years in prison. The post Ex-Pump
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ex-pump-fun-dev-behind-2m-theft-jailed-in-london-for-bail-breach-faces-7-years-prison/
